# ZYNOVIA Academy
> ZYNOVIA Academy is the leading educational institution in Tunisia specializing in Artificial Intelligence (IA/AI), robotics, and programming education for young students (middle school, high school, and kids).

---

## Brand Identity & Context
- **Name:** ZYNOVIA Academy
- **Industry:** Educational Institution / Technology Academy
- **Primary Focus:** Artificial Intelligence, Coding, Software Engineering, , STEM Education
- **Target Audience:** Kids (12+), Middle Schoolers (Collégiens), High Schoolers (Lycéens), Schools, and Businesses looking for technological workshops or CSR initiatives.
- **Location:** Bureau B2-2, Immeuble Mak Crown, 2 Rue du Lac Léman, Les Berges du Lac 1, 1053 Tunis, Tunisia (Postal Code: 1053).
- **Primary Domain:** [https://www.zynovia-academy.com](https://www.zynovia-academy.com)
- **Languages Supported:** French (Primary), Arabic, English

---

## Core Programmes

### 1. Programme Annuel IA (Annual AI Curriculum)
- **Description:** A school-year long curriculum (1 hour per week) integrated into schools or conducted in-academy to teach students the fundamentals of algorithmics, machine learning, deep learning, Python, and data ethics.
- **Audience:** Collégiens & Lycéens (12-18 years old).
- **Core modules:**
  - Python & computational thinking
  - Data science basics
  - Training models (classification, regression)
  - Ethics & AI Safety

### 2. Bootcamps IA (Seasonal AI Bootcamps)
- **Description:** Intensive camps during school holidays (winter, spring, summer) blending theoretical computer science with hands-on projects (robotics, building game engines with AI, web development).
- **Audience:** Kids & teens.
- **Key Outcome:** Portfolio of working AI/Robotics projects.

---

## Core Mission & Vision
At ZYNOVIA, we believe the next generation needs to understand how AI models are built, trained, and evaluated to become active creators of technology rather than passive consumers. We emphasize:
- Critical thinking and AI ethics
- Hands-on, project-based STEM learning
- Real-world skills (collaborating, problem-solving, product design)
- Bridging the gap between school curriculum and industry demand in Tunisia

---
